title: Clean up merge conflicts in coordinated capacity and related specs
description: Consolidate merge conflicts from multiple worker branches in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md, draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md, draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md, 03-addressing.md, sales-playbook.md into coherent normative text. Include spelled-out pseudocode for select_channel/adaptive_sf_select/now(), CH0 control rules, capability DIO, CCP-9 da2q, density/EMA/load, test vector xrefs. Remove conflicts, duplicates, notes. Consistent with independent oracles. Keep CC-BY-4.0. Summarize resolved sections.
